title: BasicallyRevolver
description: adds a fun ULTRAKILL-esque  fun to the game
body:
this mod adds a GUN to the game, it in many ways inspired by ULTRAKILL

- the gun can interrupt ender-pearls, causing it thrower to instantly teleport to it
- it can break arrow projectiles
- it can boost tridents, turning them into a raycast, that will deal 12 damage on hit, and can pierce up to 4 entities
- if you shoot a slimeball item, the shot will become bouncy, bouncing up to 3 times, dealing 3 damage on all hits, pierces infinite entities, has no i-frames
- can explode all explosive non-living entities instantly when shot
